mapper.select: SELECT d.discount_id, d.product_id, d.description, d.discount_type, d.rules, d.expiration_date, p.product_id AS product_productId, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS product_price, p.stock AS product_stock, p.category AS product_category FROM discounts d LEFT JOIN products p ON d.product_id = p.product_id WHERE d.discount_id = #{discountId}

SELECT d.discount_id, d.product_id, d.description, d.discount_type, d.rules, d.expiration_date, p.product_id AS product_productId, p.name AS product_name, p.price AS product_price, p.stock AS product_stock, p.category AS product_category FROM discounts d LEFT JOIN products p ON d.product_id = p.product_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO discounts (product_id, description, discount_type, rules, expiration_date) VALUES (#{productId}, #{description}, #{discountType}, #{rules}, #{expirationDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE discounts SET product_id = #{productId}, description = #{description}, discount_type = #{discountType}, rules = #{rules}, expiration_date = #{expirationDate} WHERE discount_id = #{discountId}
